title: tunaFlow
description: A family of focused, open-source dev tools from hang-in. AI agents on one side, real-time graphics and physics on the other.
eyebrow: Of the agent, By the agent, For the agent

ai-dev.heading: AI dev
ai-dev.lede: Tools for working with coding agents - orchestrating, routing, visualising, and grounding them.

shader-physics.heading: Real-time graphics & physics
shader-physics.lede: WebGPU-first simulations. Solar systems, gravity, black holes. Built for the browser, run on your GPU.
